en: and tormenting the farm boy that worked there.
ko: 그리고 그곳에서 일하던 농장 소년을 괴롭혔습니다.

en: His name was Wesley, but she never called him that.
ko: 그의 이름은 웨슬리였지만, 그녀는 그렇게 부르지 않았습니다.

en: Nothing gave Buttercup as much pleasure as ordering Wesley around.
ko: 버터컵에게 웨슬리를 부리는 것만큼 즐거운 일은 없었습니다.

en: Farm boy, polish my horse's saddle.
ko: 농장 소년, 내 말 안장을 닦아줘.

en: I want to see my face shining in it by morning.
ko: 아침까지 내 얼굴이 반짝이게 하고 싶어.

en: As you wish was all he ever said to her.
ko: "원하시는 대로요"가 그가 그녀에게 한 말 전부였습니다.

en: Farm boy, fill these with water.
That day she was amazed to discover that when he was saying,
ko: 그날 그녀는 그가 "원하시는 대로요"라고 말할 때,

en: as you wish, what he meant was, I love you.
And even more amazing was the day she realized she truly loved him back.
ko: 그리고 그녀가 진정으로 그를 사랑한다는 것을 깨달은 날은 더욱 놀라웠습니다.
